title: Brimstone
body: This mod includes 1 new boss that will drop a new ore that can be used to craft new armour and a new sword. The new ore also makes one new item called the Box of holding which, when right clicked will open 10 extra inventory slots. 2 other items have been addded that do not include the new ore. The Totem of Agility grants the user the ability to dash and the Mysterious Pebble is a mystery.
